ddls:
CREATE TABLE "credit_cards" (
  "card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit card */,
  "card_name" TEXT /* Name of the credit card */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the credit card */,
  "annual_fee" TEXT /* Annual fee associated with the card */,
  "bonus_offer" TEXT /* Bonus offer available for new cardholders */,
  "rewards_rate" TEXT /* Rewards rate for purchases made with the card */,
  "purchase_intro_apr" TEXT /* Introductory APR for purchases */,
  "transfer_intro_apr" TEXT /* Introductory APR for balance transfers */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of credit card (e.g., Rewards, Travel, Business) */,
  "annual_fee_waiver" TEXT /* Annual fee waiver details (e.g., First Year Free) */,
  "rewards_structure" TEXT /* Structure of rewards (e.g., Cash Back, Points, Miles) */,
  "foreign_currency_fee" TEXT /* Foreign currency transaction fee */,
  "minimum_credit_score" INTEGER /* Minimum credit score required to apply */,
  "cash_advance_apr" TEXT /* APR for cash advances */,
  "late_payment_fee" TEXT /* Late payment fee */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the issuer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_issuer_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuer_id") REFERENCES issuers ("issuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the user */,
  "spending_habits" TEXT /* Spending habits of the user (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., Personal, Business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the card */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit card that has been favorited */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the card was added to favorites */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes about the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES credit_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the application */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit card applied for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Pending, Approved, Denied) */,
  "applied_at" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "application_number" TEXT /* Unique number provided by the issuer */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the application decision was made */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the application decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES credit_cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issuers" (
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issuer */,
  "issuer_name" TEXT /* Name of the issuing bank or financial institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the issuer */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the issuer's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the issuer's official website */,
  "customer_service_phone" TEXT /* Customer service phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit card being analyzed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the card was viewed */,
  "apply_count" INTEGER /* Number of applications submitted for the card */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded analytics data */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Percentage of users who clicked through to the card details */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Percentage of users who applied after viewing */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the card based on user reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES credit_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit card used for the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., Groceries, Gas, Dining) */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "reward_points_earned" REAL /* Points or cash back earned from the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES credit_cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leaving the review */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit card being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the card (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the review was created */,
  "usefulness" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review useful */,
  "verified_user" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES credit_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional offer */,
  "card_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit card associated with the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Conditions for eligibility (e.g., New Cardholders Only) */,
  "terms_and_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed terms and conditions of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES credit_cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Alert message content */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Read status of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Application Status, New Offer) */,
  "link" TEXT /* URL to more information or action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the ticket */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the support ticket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was created */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the ticket (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was last updated */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the support agent assigned to the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
